worldgen._comment_00 [default: Worldgen controls: Worldgen controls for Nether biomes. Edit values, then restart world.
worldgen._comment_global_size_multiplier [default: global_size_multiplier: scales biome size globally. Default: 1.0. Possible: 0.05..16.0
worldgen._comment_global_frequency_multiplier [de: global_frequency_multiplier: scales biome spawn frequency globally. Default: 1.0. Possible: 0.0..32.0
